formative_topics: s & p Block Elements: Trends and Properties (Unit 3)
The Gaseous State: Gas Laws and Deviations
General Principles and Processes of Isolation of Elements

structure_rules: No chapter wise weightage provided, but all chapters must be covered.
Suitable internal variations may be made for generating various templates.
There will be no overall choice in the question paper.
33% internal choices will be given in all sections.

domains.description: Exhibit memory of previously learned material by recalling facts, terms, basic concepts and answers. Demonstrate understanding of facts and ideas.
Solve problems to new situations by applying acquired knowledge, facts, techniques and rules in a different way.
Examine and break information into parts by identifying motives or causes. Make inferences... Present and defend opinions...

internal_assessment.policy: Schools can integrate formative topics with existing chapters as they align well.
internal_assessment.stress_reduction_note: Topics assessed only formatively to reduce academic stress while ensuring meaningful learning.

requirements: Record at least five of the listed experiments.
Format: Aim, apparatus required, simple theory, procedure, related skills, precautions.

project_assessment.nature: Scientific investigations involving laboratory testing and collecting information from other sources.
suggested_topics_class_xi: Checking bacterial contamination in drinking water (sulphide ion)
Testing hardness/Iron/Fluoride/Chloride in regional drinking water
Foaming capacity of washing soaps and effect of Sodium carbonate
Rate of evaporation of different liquids
Effect of acids/bases on tensile strength of fibers
suggested_topics_class_xii: Presence of oxalate ions in guava at ripening stages
Quantity of casein in milk samples
Preparation and comparison of soybean milk with natural milk
Effect of Potassium Bisulphate as food preservative
Digestion of starch by salivary amylase (pH/temperature effect)
Rate of fermentation: wheat flour, gram flour, potato juice, carrot juice
Extraction of essential oils from Saunf/Ajwain/Illaichi
